# dataSourceUpdated(_:)

**Instance Method**

Invoked when additional data has been received.

## Declaration

```swift
func dataSourceUpdated(_ dataSource: WebDataSource!)
```

## Parameters

- **dataSource**: The source of the new data.

## Setting the data source

- **setDataSource(_:)**: Invoked when the data source for this document has been changed.
